---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Toma Pomodoro
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this solve? Why does it matter for your focus routine?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Device(s) affected
Is this specific to a model/bucket, or does it apply to all supported devices?

## Additional context
Mockups, references to other apps, links — anything that helps.
